'''The Weary Traveler''' was one of the two small [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]] in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] frequented this cantina during the initial stages of his self-imposed exile on Tatooine. It featured a [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] receiver, a [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|vaporator]], and a selection of offworld [[Brandy/Legends|brandy]]. It was here that Obi-Wan learned of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] survival after leaving him for dead on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]]. Shortly after receiving this news, Obi-Wan was visited for the first time by the [[Force ghost/Legends|Force ghost]] of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]'' {{Ab|Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader (unabridged audiobook)}}
*''[[The Life and Legend of Obi-Wan Kenobi]]''
